subparts.text: Differentiate between Bridge, Switch and Router. 2.5
Differentiate between LAN, MAN, and WAN. 2.5
Compare and contrast CSMA/CD with CSMA/CA. 2.5
Explain the netstat and ifconfig commands with a suitable example. 2.5
Differentiate between network layer delivery and transport layer delivery with the help of an example. 2.5
Draw and explain the frame format of Ethernet. 2.5
What is World Wide Web . How is HTTP related to WWW? 2.5
Why is flow control needed and how is it different from congestion control? 2.5

questions.question_text: What are the factors that should be kept in mind while choosing a suitable network topology? Explain any four topologies with suitable diagrams along with their advantages and disadvantages.
What do you mean by Link-to-Link Layers of OSI model? Explain their function in brief. List and explain various types of Unguided media used for data communication.

What are the drawbacks of IPv4? Draw and explain the various fields in the header format of IPv6. An organization is granted the block 130.34.12.64/26. The organization needs four subnetworks, each with an equal number of hosts. Design the subnetworks and find the information about each network.
Explain the Distance Vector routing algorithm with a suitable example and differentiate it with Link state routing algorithm. What is count- to-infinity problem and how it can be resolved?
How does congestion affect the network performance? Explain the leaky bucket and token bucket algorithm of congestion control with their merits and demerits.
Draw and explain the various fields in the header format of TCP protocol. Explain the Go-Back-n ARQ method in detail. How is it different from Selective repeat ARQ?

Why do we need a DNS system when we can directly use an IP address? Explain the Generic, Country, and Inverse domains used in the Internet. Differentiate between Local login and remote login. Explain how Telnet can be used for Remote login.
Write short note on any two of the following FTP SNMP Firewall
